messages.text: Vaelnith unfolds a limb of pure absence and draws it through you, and where it passes the warmth and the light go out of you together. The blow {verb} you!
Vaelnith reaches for you with an arm of folded dark and you fling yourself clear of the place where being stops.
Vaelnith closes the whole of its unlight around you and for a heartbeat you are simply not there! The blow {verb} you!
